patterns: sir dard hai aur chakkar aa rahe hain
I feel very weak and tired
responses: Bukhaar (Fever): Agar 100°F se zyada hai, paracetamol lein aur paani zyada piyein. Agar 3 din mein theek nahi hota ya 103°F se zyada ho, turant doctor ke paas jayein.
Pet Dard (Stomach Pain): Thanda paani ya ORS piyein. Agar dard bahut tez ho, ulti ke saath khoon aaye ya 24 ghante se zyada rahe, Nabha Civil Hospital jayein.
Khansi (Cough): Garam paani mein namak daalkar gargle karein. Agar 2 hafte se zyada ho ya khoon aaye, TB test ke liye hospital se milein. Yeh test free hai.
Sir Dard (Headache): Aaram karein, paani piyein. Agar aankhon ke aage andhera aaye, haath-pair sune padein, ya achanak bahut tez dard ho — yeh emergency hai, seedha hospital jayein.

patterns: Nabha hospital mein doctor hai kya
civil hospital ki kya situation hai
responses: Nabha Civil Hospital mein abhi 11 doctors kaam kar rahe hain (23 mein se). Staff ki kami hai, isliye wait time zyada ho sakta hai. Subah 8 baje pahunchne ki koshish karein.
OPD timing: Subah 8:00 AM se 2:00 PM (Monday–Saturday). Emergency 24 ghante khuli rehti hai. Sunday ko sirf emergency services available hain.
Doctor availability update: General OPD, Maternity, aur Child Health services available hain. Specialist doctors limited hain — pehle junior doctor se milein jo aapko aage refer kar sakta hai.
Waiting time bachane ke liye: Apna Aadhar card aur pehle ke prescription saath laye aayein. Community Health Worker (ASHA Worker) se pehle milein — woh fast-track kar sakti hain.

patterns: kaunsi dawai hospital mein free milti hai
responses: Nabha Civil Hospital mein FREE milne wali dawaiyan: Paracetamol, ORS, Iron Tablets, Antacids, basic Antibiotics (Amoxicillin), aur BP medicines. Ye sab Jan Aushadhi Kendra se milti hain.
Agar hospital mein stock nahi hai: Nabha bus stand ke paas Jan Aushadhi Store mein 50–90% sasti generic medicines milti hain. Wahan apna prescription dikhayein.
Diabetes aur BP ki dawai: Ye hospital se monthly free milti hai — Ayushman Bharat card ya BPL card leke aayein. Pehli baar doctor se prescription banwayen.

Emergency mein dawai khatam ho gayi: Apne nearest ASHA worker ko call karein. Unke paas basic first-aid stock rehta hai. ORS ghar par bhi ban sakta hai: 1 litre paani + 6 chammach cheeni + आधा chammach namak.

patterns: internet nahi hai records kaise dekhein
digital health card kya hota hai
Ayushman card se records kaise nikaalein
responses: ABHA (Ayushman Bharat Health Account) card banwayen — yeh aapka digital health ID card hai. Ek baar banane ke baad, aapke saare records usme save rehte hain, jo offline bhi dikha sakte hain.
Offline records access karne ke liye: Hospital ke help desk pe jaayein aur apna ABHA number ya Aadhar number dijiye. Woh aapke records print kar denge. Hamesha ek printed copy apne paas rakhen.
Agar ABHA card nahi hai: Hospital ke registration counter par free mein banwayen. Sirf Aadhar card chahiye. Isme aapke vaccinations, lab reports, aur prescriptions automatically save ho jaate hain.
Practical tip: Apne phone mein apni dawaiyon ki photo kheeench lein. Purane prescriptions ka photo lena bahut zaroori hai — bina internet ke bhi kaam aata hai emergency mein.

patterns: bahut tez dard ho raha hai
bohot zyada khoon aa raha hai
baby born ho raha hai ghar pe
responses: 🚨 TURANT CALL KAREIN: Ambulance — 108 (FREE, 24/7). Nabha Civil Hospital Emergency — 01765-220033. Yeh number bina internet ke bhi kaam karta hai.

Saanp katne par (Snakebite): Hilayein mat, katne wali jagah ko dil se neeche rakhen. Katne ki jagah ko baandhen NAHI. Seedha hospital jayein — antivenom sirf hospital mein milta hai. Time bahut zaroori hai.

Chest Pain / Stroke: Agar seene mein dard hai, haath mein sunn-pan hai, ya bolne mein takleef hai — yeh HEART ATTACK ya STROKE ho sakta hai. Lait jaayein, tight kapde dheele karein, aur 108 call karein. Aspirin dein agar available ho.

Ghar par delivery (Home Birth Emergency): 108 call karein turant. Saaf kapda aur garam paani taiyaar rakhen. Naal (umbilical cord) ko khud kaatne ki koshish NA karein. ASHA worker ko bhi call karein — unka number village mein pasted hoga.

patterns: garbhwati mahila ko kya khaana chahiye
delivery ke liye kya karna hai
prasav ke baad kya karna chahiye
iron folic acid tablet kyon leni chahiye
responses: Pregnancy check-ups: Minimum 4 ANC (Ante-Natal Care) visits zaruri hain — pehli 12 weeks mein, phir 20, 28, aur 36 weeks par. Sab Nabha Civil Hospital mein FREE hain. Apni ASHA worker se milein.
Zaruri supplements: Iron-Folic Acid (IFA) tablets roz leni chahiye — yeh anemia se bachati hain. Calcium tablets bhi milti hain. Dono FREE hain hospital se. Apne ASHA worker se lein.
Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY): Hospital mein delivery karne par government ₹1400 deti hai. Aapki ASHA worker aapko pura process mein help karegi aur transport arrange kar sakti hai.
Baby ke teeke (Vaccination): Janm ke turant baad — BCG, OPV, Hepatitis B. 6 hafte mein — Pentavalent, OPV. Sab FREE hain. Apna 'Mother & Child Protection Card' hamesha saath rakhen.

patterns: child ko diarrhea ho raha hai
bache ki growth theek nahi hai
school mein bachche ko chakkar aate hain
bachche ko khujli ho rahi hai
5 saal se chote bachche ko kya dein
responses: Diarrhea in children: ORS solution pila-te raho — thodi thodi matra mein baar baar. Zinc tablets (10 days course) bhi dein — yeh FREE milti hai hospital ya anganwadi se. Agar 6 ghante mein sudhaar nahi, hospital jayein.

Malnutrition (Kuposhan): Agar bachche ka wajan uski umar ke hisaab se bahut kam hai, turant anganwadi worker se milein. 'Poshan Abhiyan' ke tahat FREE supplementary food milta hai. SAM (Severe Acute Malnutrition) ke liye NRC (Nutrition Rehabilitation Centre) available hai.

Fever in children under 5: 100°F se zyada pe Paracetamol syrup dein (weight ke hisaab se). Thande paani ki patti maathen pe rakhen. Agar seizure aaye ya bachcha bahut zyada sust ho — yeh emergency hai, 108 call karein.

Anganwadi services (FREE): Daily nutritious meal, growth monitoring, vaccination support, pre-school education, aur health check-ups. Har village mein anganwadi center hai — apni local worker se milein.

patterns: kisan ko tension ho rahi hai
kisi se baat nahi karna chahta
responses: Aap akele nahi hain. Stress, anxiety, aur depression — yeh aam bimariyan hain jinka ilaaj possible hai. Inahe chhupaane ki zaroorat nahi. Nabha Civil Hospital mein free counseling available hai.
Vandrevala Foundation Helpline: 1860-2662-345 (24/7, FREE, Hindi mein). iCall: 9152987821. Yeh offline area mein bhi kaam karta hai — sirf basic phone signal chahiye.
Kisan helplines: PM-Kisan helpline 155261 par financial stress aur crop support ke liye call kar sakte hain. Aksar financial tension mental health ka main cause hota hai — dono saath solve honge.

Daily tips for stress: Roz 20 minute walk karein. Kisi dost ya pariwar se baat karein. Neend poori lein. Yeh simple steps bohot fark dalte hain. Agar 2 hafte se zyada problem ho, doctor se zaroor milein.

patterns: BPL card se kya milta hai
responses: Ayushman Bharat - PM-JAY: BPL families ko ₹5 lakh tak FREE treatment milti hai per year. Nabha Civil Hospital empanelled hai. Apna Ayushman card banwayen — sirf Aadhar aur ration card chahiye.
Punjab Sarkar ki Mukhyamantri Sehat Bima Yojana: ₹5 lakh ki cashless coverage sabhi registered families ke liye. Panchayat office ya Common Service Centre (CSC) mein enroll karein.

Nabha Civil Hospital mein PEHLE SE FREE: OPD consultation, basic medicines, maternity services, child vaccination, TB/Malaria treatment, aur X-ray/basic lab tests. Koi bhi payment ki zaroorat nahi in services ke liye.
Scheme ke liye apply karne ki jagah: Apne village ka CSC (Common Service Centre), Panchayat office, ya ASHA worker se milein. Documents: Aadhar card, ration card, BPL certificate (agar applicable).

patterns: paani peene se bimari ho rahi hai
village mein bimari phail rahi hai
responses: Paani saaf karne ka tarika (no electricity needed): 1 litre paani mein 2 drops bleach (chlorine) daalein aur 30 minute rakhein. Ya paani ko ubaalein (5 minute). Ya ORS/alum (fitkari) daalein — yeh impurities neeche bitha deta hai.
Contaminated water ke symptoms: Ulti, dast, pet dard, bukhaar — yeh Cholera, Typhoid, ya Hepatitis A ke signs ho sakte hain. ORS piyein aur TURANT hospital jayein. Yeh bimariyan tezi se phailti hain.
Haath dhoye ka sahi tarika: Khaana khaane se pehle, shaucha ke baad, aur bachche ko khaana dene se pehle — HAMESHA sabun se 20 second haath dhoyen. Yeh 80% infections rokta hai.

Village mein bimari fail rahi ho to: Turant gram panchayat ya ASHA worker ko batayein. Village-level disease outbreak PHC (Primary Health Centre) ko report hoti hai. Yeh Swachh Bharat Mission ka hissa hai — free sanitation support milta hai.

patterns: kya tum meri madad kar sakte ho
responses: Namaste! Main Nabha Civil Hospital ka health assistant hoon. Main aapko symptoms, doctor availability, medicines, aur government health schemes ke baare mein bataa sakta hoon.
Sat Sri Akal! Aap kisi bhi health sawal ke baare mein puch sakte hain — fever, dard, pregnancy, bachche ki health, ya hospital ki jankari. Main 173 villages ke logo ki madad ke liye hoon.

Hello! I'm your offline health assistant for the Nabha region. I can help with symptoms, medicine availability, hospital information, emergency guidance, and government health schemes. What do you need help with today?
Aap aise pooch sakte hain: 'Mujhe bukhaar hai kya karoon?', 'Hospital mein doctor hai kya?', ya 'Free medicine kahan milegi?' — Main aapki madad karoonga.

patterns: kab doctor se mil sakte hain
token system kya hai hospital ka
phone pe appointment ho sakti hai kya
responses: Nabha Civil Hospital OPD: Walk-in system hai — koi advance booking nahi chahiye. Subah 7:30 baje pahunch jaayein token lene ke liye. General OPD sab se pehle aata hai.
Token system: Registration counter se free token milta hai. Senior citizens aur pregnant women ko priority milti hai. ASHA worker ka letter laane par bhi fast-track ho sakta hai.
Specialist consultation: Eye (Ophthalmology), Skin (Dermatology), aur Orthopedic OPD specific days pe hoti hai. Counter pe ya ASHA worker se schedule poochein — woh updated rehti hain.
Phone se appointment: Abhi phone booking available nahi hai Nabha Civil mein. Lekin 104 helpline (FREE) pe call karke doctor se phone pe basic advice le sakte hain bina hospital aaye.

patterns: TB test ke liye kya karna hai
kya test bina doctor ke ho sakta hai
responses: Nabha Civil Hospital mein FREE lab tests: Complete Blood Count (CBC), Blood Sugar (Fasting/PP), Hemoglobin, Urine Routine, Malaria test, TB sputum test, aur Pregnancy test. Doctor ka prescription zaroori hai.
Lab timing: Subah 8:00 AM se 12:00 PM (sample collection). Results usually same day ya agle din milte hain. TB test ke results 2 din mein aate hain.
X-Ray aur Ultrasound: Nabha Civil Hospital mein available hai, FREE for referred patients. Direct nahi milta — pehle doctor se milein.
Agar lab closed ho ya test available nahi: Jan Aushadhi Kendra ke paas kaafi private labs hain jahan basic tests ₹50–₹200 mein hote hain — sarkari lab se kaafi saste.

patterns: BP ki dawai khatam ho gayi
kya main mitha kha sakta hun
responses: Diabetes symptoms: Baar baar pyas lagna, baar baar peshab aana, aankhon ka dhundhla dikhna, thakaan. Agar yeh symptoms hain — FREE blood sugar test ke liye Nabha Civil Hospital jayein.
NCD (Non-Communicable Disease) Clinic: Nabha Civil Hospital mein har hafte FREE NCD clinic hoti hai. Diabetes aur BP dono manage hote hain — FREE medicine bhi milti hai. Doctor se NCD card banwaayen.

Diet tips for rural patients: Atta+bajra roti prefer karein, white rice kam karein. Gur aur cheeni kam karein. Sarson ka saag, methi — yeh natural sugar control karte hain. Roz 30 min kheton mein kaam ya chalna bhi medication jaisa kaam karta hai.
BP emergency: Agar BP 180/120 se zyada ho, severe headache ho, ya aankhon ke aage andhera aaye — yeh HYPERTENSIVE CRISIS hai. 108 call karein aur seedha hospital jayein. Khud dawai dose mat badhayen.

patterns: TB ka ilaaj free hai kya
khansi mein khoon aa raha hai
TB medicine kitne time leni hoti hai
TB patient ko kya khaana chahiye
responses: TB ke symptoms: 2 hafte se zyada khansi, khansi mein khoon, raat ko paseena, bina karan wajan ghatna, sham ko bukhaar. Yeh symptoms hain toh TURANT Nabha Civil Hospital mein FREE sputum test karwayen.
TB ka ilaaj: DOTS (Directly Observed Treatment, Short-course) ke tahat 6 mahine ki FREE dawai milti hai. Ilaaj beech mein band karna BAHUT khatarnaak hai — dawai resistant ho jaati hai.
Nikshay Poshan Yojana: TB patients ko ₹500 per month nutrition support milti hai government se — directly bank account mein. Hospital mein enrollment FREE hai. Apna bank account number saath laayein.
TB aur social stigma: TB ek bimari hai, koi paap nahi. Dawaai lene se poori tarah theek hota hai. Apne ghar walon ko bataayen taaki woh bhi test karwaayein — family members ka free test hota hai.

patterns: aankhon mein jalan ho rahi hai
aankhon se paani aa raha hai
bachche ko school mein board nahi dikhta
responses: Nabha Civil Hospital mein Eye OPD specific days pe hoti hai. FREE check-up milti hai. Motiyabind (Cataract) ke liye FREE surgery bhi available hai — government scheme ke tahat.

Red/Itchy eyes (Conjunctivitis): Saaf paani se aankhein dhoyein. Apni aankhein haath se na ragdein. Yeh bahut contagious hai — towel, kapda share na karein. 2 din mein theek na ho toh doctor se milein.
Vision problems in children: Agar bachche ko board nahi dikhta ya aankhein sikadate hain — yeh bahut common hai. School health programs mein free eye check hoti hai. ASHA worker se poochein.
Eye camps: Nabha region mein regular FREE eye camps lagte hain. Chasma, check-up, aur surgery sab free milti hai. Apni gram panchayat ya ASHA worker se agle camp ki date poochein.

patterns: daane aa gaye hain body pe
khet mein kaam karte waqt rash aaya
responses: Fungal infection (Daad/Ringworm): Prabhavit jagah ko saaf aur sukha rakhen. Clotrimazole cream (antifungal) hospital se FREE milti hai. 2-4 hafte lagaate rahein — beech mein band na karein.

Wound infection: Laal ho rahi hai, sujan hai, ya mawad aa raha hai — yeh infection ke signs hain. Saaf paani aur antiseptic se dhoyen. Tetanus injection zaroori ho sakta hai khet mein chot ke baad — hospital jayein.

Chickenpox: Kaafi contagious hai. Bachche ko school mat bhejein. Neem ke patte paani mein ubaalkar nahlaayen (traditional remedy). Khanch mat, infection badh sakti hai. Anti-viral dawai doctor se lein.

Pesticide rash (khet mein kaam karte waqt): Turant uss jagah ko saaf paani se 15 minute dhoyein. Agar aankhon mein gaya ho — paani se dhoyein aur TURANT hospital jayein. Yeh medical emergency ho sakti hai.

Anemia (Khoon ki kami) ke liye: Hara saag (palak, methi, sarson), chana, lobia, aur til roz khaayen. Khaane ke baath nimbu paani piyein — vitamin C iron absorb karne mein help karta hai. FREE Iron tablets hospital ya anganwadi se lein.
Cheap protein sources for rural families: Daal (masoor/moong/chana) — roz khaayen. Eggs — sab se sasta complete protein. Sattu — bahut sasta, protein se bhara. Dahi — gut health ke liye bhi achha.
Vitamin D (Dhoop ki zaroorat): Subah 10-11 baje 20 minute dhoop mein baithein — yeh FREE medicine hai. Doodh aur eggs bhi achhe sources hain. Vitamin D ki kami se haddiyan kamzor hoti hain.

Khet mein kaam karne walon ke liye: Zyada paseena aane se namak aur paani ki kami hoti hai. ORS ya nimbu paani + namak + cheeni ka gharelu ORS peete rahein. Subah heavy meal, sham ko light meal rakhein.

patterns: baby ka pehla teeka kab hota hai
responses: Shishu vaccination (FREE at Nabha Civil): Janm pe — BCG, OPV-0, Hep-B. 6 weeks — Pentavalent, OPV, Rotavirus. 9-12 months — Measles-Rubella. 16-24 months — Booster doses. Apna Mother & Child card update rakhein.
Tetanus injection: Khet mein ya kisi zaang-daag cheez se chot aaye toh 24 ghante ke andar tetanus injection FREE milta hai hospital mein. 5 saal mein pichla tetanus nahi liya — turant lein.
Village Immunization Day: ASHA worker ke saath milke agle village health & nutrition day ka pata karein. Har mahine hoti hai — saari FREE vaccines ek jagah milti hain.

Adults ko bhi vaccines chahiye: Influenza (flu) — bujaurg logon ke liye. Hepatitis B — healthcare workers ke liye. COVID boosters — available at hospital. Doctor se poochein aap ke liye kya recommended hai.

Cut/Wound (Kaat gaya): Saaf kapde se 5-10 minute pressure daalein. Saaf paani se dhoyen. Antiseptic lagayen. Agar bahut gehri chot ho ya khoon band na ho — TURANT hospital. Zaang wali cheez se kati ho toh tetanus zaroor lein.

Burns (Jalna): Turant 15-20 minute THANDE paani se dhoyen. Kapde mat nikaalein agar chip gaye hain. Butter/oil/toothpaste BILKUL mat lagayen — infection hoti hai. Agar bada area jalay ya chehra/haath jalay — 108 call karein.

Electric Shock (Bijli ka jhatka): Pehle bijli band karein ya wood se person ko hataayen. Seedha mat chhuyen. Agar saans nahi aa rahi — CPR shuru karein (30 chest compressions, 2 breaths). 108 call karein.

Heat Stroke (Loo lagna): Thandi jagah le jaayein, thanda paani piyein. Kapde dheele karein. Thandi paani ki patti maathen, baghon, aur gardan pe rakhen. Agar behosh ho — 108 call karein. Summer mein dopahar 12-4 baje bahar kaam na karein.

patterns: specialist ke liye kahan jaana hoga
transport nahi hai hospital ke liye
responses: FREE Ambulance: 108 (24/7, koi bhi area). Yeh life-threatening emergencies ke liye hai. ASHA worker bhi transport help kar sakti hai deliveries aur serious cases ke liye — unka number apne paas rakhein.

Referral process: Nabha Civil Hospital mein jo cases handle nahi ho sakte woh Rajindra Hospital Patiala ya PGI Chandigarh refer hote hain. Refer hone par GOVERNMENT TRANSPORT ya fuel reimbursement milta hai.
Rajindra Hospital, Patiala: 35 km from Nabha. Bus available (₹30-50). Yahan specialist doctors hain — Neurology, Cardiology, Nephrology etc. Nabha se referral letter zaroor laana.
Aadhar se linked transport schemes: Ayushman card se referred patients ko Patiala tak transport cost reimburse hoti hai. Hospital ke social welfare officer se milein — woh process mein help karenge.
